description: Add a deterministic E2E test from an active due DiscoveryProgram through Oban execution, Exa fixture responses, candidate persistence, dedupe/ranking, selective enrichment, Acquisition Finding creation, provenance, and operator review readiness. Include manual and scheduled launch through the same Ash interface. Acceptance: the test proves durable statuses/costs and no duplicate candidates or findings after retry.
title: Prove Exa scheduled discovery end to end
